mapper.select: SELECT id, email, password, name, phone, age, gender, email_verified, nickname, profile_image, role, created_at, is_deleted, provider, provider_id FROM USER WHERE email = #{email} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT id, email, password, name, phone, age, email_verified AS emailVerified, nickname, profile_image AS profileImage, role, created_at AS createdAt, is_deleted AS deleted, provider, provider_id AS providerId FROM USER WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM USER WHERE email = #{email}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM USER WHERE nickname = #{nickname}

SELECT id, email, password, name, phone, age, email_verified AS emailVerified, nickname, profile_image AS profileImage, role, created_at AS createdAt, is_deleted AS deleted, provider, provider_id AS providerId FROM USER WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USER ( email, nickname, email_verified, role, provider, provider_id, created_at, is_deleted as deleted ) VALUES ( #{email}, #{nickname}, 1, 'MEMBER', #{provider}, #{providerId}, NOW(), 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE USER SET password = #{password} WHERE email = #{email}
mapper.select: SELECT id, email, password, name, phone, age, email_verified AS emailVerified, nickname, profile_image AS profileImage, role, created_at AS createdAt, is_deleted AS deleted, provider, provider_id AS providerId FROM USER WHERE provider = #{provider}
SELECT nickname FROM USER WHERE id = #{id}
